title: Network Topology
description: Declared network topology for a broodforge cell — bridges, VLANs, and firewall policy. This is the authoritative declaration from which network config is generated and against which observed state is compared during Tier 2 assessment.

cell_id.description: Infrastructure cell this topology belongs to

bridges.description: Linux bridges managed on the Proxmox host

observed_at.description: Timestamp when observed state was last collected for comparison

drift_summary.description: Human-readable drift summary from last collector run

ports.description: Physical NIC(s) enslaved to this bridge

vlan_aware.description: Whether this bridge is VLAN-aware (enables 802.1Q tagging for VM NICs)

ip.description: Host IP address on this bridge, CIDR notation e.g. 192.168.1.10/24. Null for VM-only bridges.

gateway.description: Default gateway reachable via this bridge. Null if not the management bridge.

purpose.description: Human-readable description of this bridge's role

headscale_bridge.description: If true, Headscale and WAN-reachable services bind to an IP on this bridge

management_bridge.description: If true, this is the primary management bridge (Proxmox web UI, SSH, DNS)

bridge.description: The VLAN-aware bridge this VLAN is associated with

enabled.description: Whether Proxmox datacenter-level firewall is enabled

host_policy.description: Default policy for traffic to the Proxmox host itself
